author.bio: Security Team Member and Trusted User @Archlinux. Mostly interested In DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering and Security. Tweets in DE and EN.
author.name: shibumi

content.text: Well, I am slightly impressed. I've been able to migrate my whole nginx configuration (80 lines) to just 20 lines of Caddy2 configuration.  Thanks a lot @caddyserver
content.html: Well, I am slightly impressed. I've been able to migrate my whole nginx configuration (80 lines) to just 20 lines of Caddy2 configuration. Thanks a lot @caddyserver
